description:
Literary copy of an epistle in Aramaic. The Judaeo-Arabic header states "from R. Yosef (or Yehosef) ha-Ṣadiq to R. כל..." The preserved content is only the top of the letter but seems to be entirely praises for God.

Verso: unidentified text in faint Hebrew characters. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
